Container.Name: Plex DB Merge
Container.Overview:
Plex library merge plus Radarr / Sonarr SQLite tools in one web UI.
Plex: merge watch history and settings from a newer or corrupt com.plexapp.plugins.library.db into an older good backup; optional merge of new library items. Uses bundled SQLite with .recover support.
Radarr / Sonarr: same maintenance flow for each app’s DB (integrity check, recover to a new file, VACUUM, REINDEX). Stop the app before repair or write operations.
Mount a host folder that can reach your database paths. In the UI, set Start browse at if the file picker should open below /data.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Host folder visible inside the container at /data. On start, ownership is set to PUID:PGID. Point the UI "Start browse at" here if your DBs live under this path.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for /data ownership and running the app (Unraid default 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for /data ownership (Unraid default 100 = users).
